debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G C : Graph α β
M M' : Set β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M
hM' : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M'
hC : C.IsCycleGraph
hCG : C ≤ @Graph.IsMatching.restrict₂ α β G M M' hM hM'
⊢ Disjoint (C.edgeSet ∩ M) (C.edgeSet ∩ M')

failed_attempts:
intro e he he'
  have h_diff : e ∈ M ∆ M' := hCG.edge_subset he.1
  exact (mem_symmDiff.1 h_diff).elim (fun h => h.2 he'.2) (fun h => h.2 he.2)

rw [disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty, ← inter_inter_distrib_left]
  refine eq_empty_of_subset_empty (inter_subset_inter_left _ ?_) (symmDiff_inter_self M M')
  intro e he
  exact (hCG.edge_subset he).1

rw [disjoint_iff_inf_le_bot]
  rintro e ⟨⟨heC, heM⟩, ⟨-, heM'⟩⟩
  have h := hCG.edge_subset heC
  simp [restrict₂] at h
  exact (Set.mem_symmDiff.mp h.1.1).2 ⟨heM, heM'⟩

have h : E(C) ⊆ M ∆ M' := by
    intro e he
    have h' := hCG.edge_subset he
    simp [restrict₂, edgeSet_loopRemove, edgeSet_restrict] at h'
    exact h'.1.2
  refine disjoint_sdiff_sdiff.mono (fun e he ↦ ?_) (fun e he ↦ ?_)
  · rw [← symmDiff_inter_self_left]; exact ⟨h he.1, he.2⟩
  · rw [← symmDiff_inter_self_right]; exact ⟨h he.1, he.2⟩

rw [disjoint_iff_inf_le_bot]
  rintro e ⟨⟨heC, heM⟩, ⟨-, heM'⟩⟩
  have h := hCG.edgeSet_subset heC
  simp [restrict₂, edgeSet_loopRemove, edgeSet_induce_edges] at h
  exact disjoint_symmDiff_inter M M' ⟨by repeat cases h; assumption, heM, heM'⟩

rintro e ⟨heC, heM⟩ ⟨_, heM'⟩
  have h := edgeSet_mono hCG heC
  simp [restrict₂, loopRemove, inducedGraph] at h
  exact (mem_symmDiff.1 h.1).elim (fun h1 ↦ h1.2 heM') (fun h1 ↦ h1.2 heM)

rintro e ⟨heC, heM⟩ ⟨-, heM'⟩
  have h : e ∈ M ∆ M' := by
    have h_sub := hCG.edge_subset heC
    simpa [restrict₂] using h_sub
  exact disjoint_symmDiff_inter ⟨h, heM, heM'⟩

have hE : E(C) ⊆ M ∆ M' := fun e he ↦ by
    simpa [restrict₂, loopRemove, restrict] using hCG.edge_subset he
  rw [disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty, ← inter_inter_distrib_left]
  exact disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty.1 ((disjoint_symmDiff_inf M M').mono hE Subset.rfl)

rw [disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty, inter_inter_inter_comm, inter_self, ← disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty]
  have hE : E(C) ⊆ M ∆ M' := hCG.2.trans (loopRemove_edgeSet_subset.trans (inter_subset_left _ _))
  exact (disjoint_symmDiff_inter M M').mono_left hE

rw [disjoint_iff_inf_le_bot]
  rintro e ⟨⟨heC, heM⟩, ⟨-, heM'⟩⟩
  have h_mem := hCG.edge_subset heC
  simp [restrict₂] at h_mem
  exact (mem_symmDiff.1 h_mem.1).2 ⟨heM, heM'⟩

rintro e ⟨heC, heM⟩ ⟨-, heM'⟩
  have h := edgeSet_mono hCG heC
  simp [IsMatching.restrict₂, mem_symmDiff] at h
  exact h.1.1 (iff_of_true heM heM')

intro e he
  have h := hCG.edge_subset he.1.1
  simp [restrict₂] at h
  exact (mem_symmDiff.1 h.1).elim (fun h1 ↦ h1.2 he.2.2) (fun h2 ↦ h2.2 he.1.2)

rintro e ⟨⟨heC, heM⟩, ⟨-, heM'⟩⟩
  have h := edgeSet_mono hCG heC
  simp [restrict₂] at h
  exact (mem_symmDiff.1 h.1.2).2 ⟨heM, heM'⟩

refine disjoint_left.mpr (fun e he he' ↦ ?_)
  exact (mem_symmDiff.mp (hCG.edge_subset he.1).1).2 ⟨he.2, he'.2⟩

rintro e ⟨⟨heC, heM⟩, ⟨-, heM'⟩⟩
  simpa [IsMatching.restrict₂, loopRemove, restrict, mem_symmDiff] using hCG.edge_subset heC

have hE : E(C) ⊆ M ∆ M' := fun e he ↦ by
    simpa [restrict₂, Graph.loopRemove, Graph.restrict] using hCG.edge_subset he
  rw [disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty, inter_inter_inter_comm, inter_self]
  exact (disjoint_symmDiff_inter M M').mono_left hE |>.inter_eq

have hsub : E(C) ⊆ M ∆ M' := fun e he ↦ by
    simpa [restrict₂, loopRemove, restrict] using hCG.edgeSet_subset he
  rw [disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty, ← inter_inter_distrib_left]
  exact (disjoint_symmDiff_inter M M').mono hsub subset_rfl |>.inter_eq

intro e he he'
  have h_mem : e ∈ M ∆ M' := by
    have h_e := hCG.edge_subset he.1
    simpa [restrict₂] using h_e
  exact (mem_symmDiff.1 h_mem).2 ⟨he.2, he'.2⟩

rintro e ⟨heC, heM⟩ ⟨-, heM'⟩
  have h_mem : e ∈ M ∆ M' := hCG.2 heC
  cases mem_symmDiff.1 h_mem <;> contradiction

rw [Set.disjoint_left]
  rintro e ⟨heC, heM⟩ ⟨-, heM'⟩
  have h := hCG.edge_subset heC
  rw [IsMatching.restrict₂, loopRemove_edgeSet, inducedSubgraph_edgeSet] at h
  have h_symm := h.1.1
  rw [Set.mem_symmDiff] at h_symm
  exact h_symm.elim (fun h' ↦ h'.2 heM') (fun h' ↦ h'.2 heM)

rintro e ⟨⟨heC, heM⟩, ⟨-, heM'⟩⟩
  have h := edgeSet_mono hCG heC
  simp [restrict₂, loopRemove_edgeSet, restrict_edgeSet] at h
  exact (mem_symmDiff.mp h.1).2 ⟨heM, heM'⟩

rw [disjoint_iff_forall_not_mem]
  rintro e ⟨⟨heC, heM⟩, ⟨-, heM'⟩⟩
  have h := Graph.edgeSet_mono hCG heC
  simp [restrict₂, loopRemove_edgeSet, restrict_edgeSet] at h
  have h_symm : e ∈ M ∆ M' := by
    revert h
    simp
    intros; assumption
  exact (mem_symmDiff.1 h_symm).2 ⟨heM, heM'⟩

rintro e ⟨heC, heM⟩ ⟨-, heM'⟩
  have h_sd := (edgeSet_subset_of_le hCG heC).1.1
  exact (mem_symmDiff.1 h_sd).elim (fun h ↦ h.2 heM') (fun h ↦ h.2 heM)

have hE : E(C) ⊆ M ∆ M' := hCG.edge_subset.trans (by simp [restrict₂, loopRemove])
  rw [disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty, inter_inter_inter_comm, inter_self]
  exact disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty.mp (disjoint_symmDiff_inter.mono_left hE)

intro e ⟨heC, heM⟩ ⟨_, heM'⟩
  have h := hCG.edge_subset heC
  simp [restrict₂, mem_symmDiff, heM, heM'] at h
  exact h.1.1

rintro e ⟨heC, heM⟩ ⟨-, heM'⟩
  have h := hCG.edge_subset heC
  simp [restrict₂, loopRemove, restrict] at h
  rcases mem_symmDiff.mp h.1.1 with ⟨-, hnot⟩ | ⟨-, hnot⟩
  · exact hnot heM'
  · exact hnot heM

intro e he
  have h := hCG.edgeSet_subset he.1.1
  simp [IsMatching.restrict₂, loopRemove_edgeSet, mem_symmDiff] at h
  cases h.1 with
  | inl h => exact h.2 he.2.2
  | inr h => exact h.2 he.1.2

rw [disjoint_iff_inter_empty, inter_inter_inter_comm, inter_self]
  rintro e ⟨heC, heMM'⟩
  exact (disjoint_symmDiff_inf M M').le_bot ⟨(hCG.edge_subset heC).1.1, heMM'⟩

intro e he he'
  have h := hCG.edge_subset he.1
  simp [restrict₂, mem_symmDiff, he.2, he'.2] at h

rintro e ⟨heC, heM⟩ ⟨-, heM'⟩
  have h := hCG.edge_subset heC
  simp [restrict₂] at h
  exact (mem_symmDiff.mp h.1.1).elim (fun h1 ↦ h1.2 heM') (fun h1 ↦ h1.2 heM)

rw [disjoint_iff_forall_not_mem]
  intro e he he'
  have h := Graph.edgeSet_mono hCG he.1
  simp [restrict₂, mem_symmDiff] at h
  tauto

rw [disjoint_iff_forall_not_mem]
  rintro e ⟨heC, heM⟩ ⟨-, heM'⟩
  have h := hCG.edge_subset heC
  simp [restrict₂] at h
  exact (mem_symmDiff.1 h.1.1).elim (fun h1 => h1.2 heM') (fun h1 => h1.1 heM)
